name: Fresh Apricot Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425°F.
2. Prepare your favorite pastry shell.
3. In a large bowl, combine the apricots and lemon juice.
4. Add the sugar, flour, and cinnamon; toss lightly to mix.
5. Place into the prepared pie pan lined with pastry.
6. Dot with butter.
7. Cover with top crust, cutting slits in the center to vent steam.
8. Seal and flute the edge.
9. Bake at 425°F for 35-40 minutes or until juice begins to bubble through the slits in the crust.
Yield: one 9-inch pie
Nutritional information: Serving size=1/6
Calories:
560 Sodium: 404 mg Fat: 27g
